nasb.text: “If a man sins against his neighbor and is made to take an oath, and he comes and takes an oath before Your altar in this house,

esv.text: “If a man sins against his neighbor and is made to take an oath and comes and swears his oath before your altar in this house,

cnv.text: “人若是得罪了鄰舍，有人要他起誓，他就來到這殿，在你的祭壇前起誓；

ccb.text: “如果有人得罪邻舍，被叫到这殿中，在你的坛前起誓，
